rules.rule_text:
rule BackdoorGenASample
{
	meta:
		Description = "Backdoor.Gen.A.vb"
		ThreatLevel = "5"

	strings:
		$ = "Form1" ascii wide
		$ = "Flamand" ascii wide
		$ = "Afildoe.Belver" ascii wide
		$ = "FromBase64String" ascii wide
		$ = "TeAdor.Properties.Resources" ascii wide

	condition:
		3 of them
}
